prompt: I need a data structure to pass around user info internally between functions in my service. It has user_id (int), username (str), roles (list of strings), and created_at (datetime). This is only used inside the service, never serialized or received from outside. What's the right approach?

assertions.text: Does NOT use Pydantic BaseModel for this internal-only data container
Uses dataclass, NamedTuple, or plain class instead
Explains WHY Pydantic is unnecessary here (internal data, no trust boundary, own code is producer)
